name: Beyond the Hard Budget: Sparsity Regularizers for More Interpretable Top-k Sparse Autoencoders

description: arXiv:2606.27321v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become a leading tool for interpreting the representations of vision foundation models, decomposing their polysemantic activations into a larger set of sparse, more monosemantic features. The Top-$k$ SAE, a now-standard variant, enforces sparsity architecturally through its activation function, retaining o...
author: Nathana\"el Jacquier, Maria Vakalopoulou, Mahdi S. Hosseini
